name: Jack Daniel's Spectacular Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the saucepan with garlic and discard the garlic.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in the saucepan.
3. Stir in the flour.
4. Slowly add the beef broth, stirring constantly.
5. Add parsley; cook until thickened. Set aside.
6. In a separate pan, sauté mushrooms and onions until tender.
7. Add whiskey and the thickened broth to the mushroom mixture.
8. Simmer over low heat for several minutes.
9. Serve over grilled or broiled chicken. Makes 2-1/2 cups.
